post.caption:
Stop bad Claude responses before they waste your time ⏱️

Streaming lets you interrupt mid-generation when you spot the response going off-track. No more waiting for terrible outputs to finish!

#ClaudeTips #AIProductivity #StreamingAI

story_data.tip_text: Stream Claude responses to interrupt bad outputs mid-generation
story_data.subtext: Stop wasted time by canceling obviously wrong responses before they finish generating
